summary: Solomon AI v3.0 Feature Testing - ALL FEATURES PASSED. Dashboard displays 50K+ member megachurch metrics. Watch section renamed with tagline. Merch native store with offering nudge. Café page with offering section. Kids Check-in with 3-digit pickup codes.

issues: Placeholder shows 'ABC-1234' format but actual codes are 3-digit numbers - minor inconsistency

watch_section_header.actual: 'Watch' header with 'Live. On Demand. Always in the Word.' tagline

watch_category_pills.details: All 7 categories visible: All, Faith, Family, Leadership, Worship, Growth, Community with proper spacing

watch_video_thumbnails.details: Netflix-style layout with hero video, object-fit:cover thumbnails, gradient overlays

merch_native_store.details: Native product grid (not iframe), Add to cart buttons, cart sidebar

merch_offering_nudge.details: 'Add an Offering' section with $5/$10/$20/Custom buttons visible in cart

kids_checkin_3_digit_codes.details: Generates 3-digit pickup codes (100-999). Mixed formats in DB from migrations.

kids_checkin_checkout_modal.details: Check Out tab with 'Enter Pickup Code' input and 'Verify Code' button

cafe_offering_section.details: 'Add an Offering' with $5/$10/$25/Other buttons in cart sidebar

admin_realtime_kids.details: LIVE indicator with 'Updates every 2s' visible on Kids Check-in admin

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Kids Check-in placeholder shows 'ABC-1234' but actual codes are 3-digit numbers - consider updating placeholder to '123' for consistency
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing megachurch demo data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Solomon AI v3.0 features fully implemented. Dashboard shows 50K member megachurch metrics with Café/Merch/Events stats. Watch section renamed from 'Abundant Church TV' to 'Watch' with tagline. Merch and Café stores have offering nudge sections. Kids Check-in generates 3-digit pickup codes (100-999).
